//: Drop into the project root. The `plugins` array is what makes nestia work — without them, the @TypedBody/@TypedRoute decorators silently no-op at runtime. After dropping this in, run `npm run prepare` (which runs ts-patch install && typia patch) once.

compilerOptions.//strict: Mandatory. typia generates validators from type info; with strict off, the validators silently let invalid data through.
compilerOptions.//plugins: These run via ts-patch during tsc. Order matters: typia first, then @nestia/core, then @nestia/sdk.

plugins.//validate: What @TypedBody runs on incoming requests. 'validate' returns every error; 'assert' throws on first; 'validateEquals' rejects extras; 'assertPrune' silently strips extras.
plugins.//stringify: What @TypedRoute runs on responses. 'assert' validates+serializes (~200x faster than JSON.stringify); 'validate.log' validates without throwing (production-safe).

plugins.//comment: Required only when building swagger at runtime via NestiaSwaggerComposer. Leave in if unsure — it's a no-op when not used.

compilerOptions.//paths: Optional path aliases — adjust to match the project.
